title: Xenial Velvety German Squid Stew
description: A hearty one-pot German dish featuring squid, score-fat, and a hint of mustard, this stew is perfect for a cold winter's night. The velvety texture and rich flavors will leave you wanting more.

ingredients.name: squid
ingredients.notes: cleaned and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Heat the score-fat in a large pot over medium heat until melted.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped carrot and potato and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the squid and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the German mustard, chicken broth, white wine, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Stir in the chopped parsley and serve hot.
Serve with crusty bread or over egg noodles.
Refrigerate or freeze leftovers for up to 3 days.
